name: I missed some work due to occupational illness but symptoms were delayed, does that hurt my claim?
description: No, prove from last work exposure; document losses[1].

mainEntity.name: I missed some work due to occupational illness but symptoms were delayed, does that hurt my claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, prove from last work exposure; document losses[1].
acceptedAnswer.description:
No, if you prove last injurious exposure caused it.

Idaho requires incapacity from last occupation exposed[1].

- Link to specific job hazards.
- Document all lost time.
- Timely notice key.

Lawyer reconstructs timeline for approval.
